---
title: "Week 02: AI-assisted dev"
---

## Introduction

This week, we'll explore the rapidly evolving landscape of AI-assisted software development. We'll compare the "big three" conversational models—Gemini, ChatGPT, and Claude—and dive deep into GitHub Copilot, our primary "Co-Pilot" for the semester. You'll learn the art of prompt engineering using the CPTF framework and discover how to leverage AI to explain, debug, and refactor your code effectively.

## Recommended readings

- [GitHub Copilot documentation](https://docs.github.com/en/copilot) - Official guide to GitHub Copilot
- [The art of prompt engineering](https://github.com/features/copilot/prompt-engineering) - Best practices for prompting AI code assistants

## Lectures

- [**Slides: AI-assisted development**](../slides/IS4010_W02_AI_Copilots.qmd)

## Interactive notebooks

- {{< iconify bi file-earmark-code >}} [Interactive notebook (rendered)](week02-notebook.ipynb)
- {{< iconify bi github >}} [Open in GitHub](https://github.com/bgreenwell/is4010-website/blob/main/weeks/week02-notebook.ipynb)
- {{< iconify bi google >}} [Open in Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/bgreenwell/is4010-website/blob/main/weeks/week02-notebook.ipynb)

## Lab assignment

- [Lab 02: AI tools for programming](https://github.com/bgreenwell/is4010-python/blob/main/week02/lab02.md)
